title: Shastri Bhawan : Vehicle Parking Label Application
text_content: Shastri Bhawan : Vehicle Parking Label Application Vehicle Parking Label Application LOGIN (Only for MOE Govt. Employees) Vehicle User Admin User Personal Vehicle Parking Label 2026 will start from 1st January 2026 (For Permanent Staff of MoE Only) This site is designed, developed, hosted and maintained by National Informatics Centre (NIC) Department of Electronics & Information Technology, Ministry of Communications & Information Technology Technology Government of India.
